---
title: Resources
toc: true
description: Software, datasets, and other resources from the ECLIPSE Lab at FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg.
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Resources</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

## Software

· [ECLIPSE Lab GitHub](https://github.com/ECLIPSE-Lab) — all open-source projects from the lab

## Presentations & Teaching

· [Lecture slides & course materials](https://pelzlab.science/public_presentations/) — slides, decks, and course presentations from the ECLIPSE Lab teaching programme

## Datasets

Stay tuned
